name: PVH CORP. /DE/
summary: PART I Introduction Unless the context otherwise requires, the terms we, our or us refer to PVH Corp. and its subsidiaries. Our fiscal years are based on the 52-53 week period ending on the Sunday closest to February 1 and are designated by the calendar year in which the fiscal year commences. References to a year are to our fiscal year, unless the context requires otherwise. Our 2025 year commenced on February 3, 2025 and ended on February 1, 2026; our 2024 year commenced on February 5, 2024 an...
